info.title: fhir-candle
info.description: A lightweight in-memory FHIR server, for when a small FHIR will do.

options.name: --url
options.description: Public URL for the server

options.name: --port
options.description: TCP port to listen on

options.name: --open-browser
options.description: Open the browser to the public URL once the server starts

options.name: --max-resources
options.description: Maximum number of resources allowed per tenant

options.name: --disable-ui
options.description: Set to disable the UI (run server headless)

options.name: --fhir-package-cache
options.description: Location of the FHIR package cache, for use with registries and IG packages. Not specified defaults to ~/.fhir.

options.name: --use-official-registries
options.description: Use official FHIR registries to resolve packages.

options.name: --additional-fhir-registry-urls
options.description: Additional FHIR registry URLs to use.

options.name: --additional-npm-registry-urls
options.description: Additional NPM registry URLs to use.

options.name: --load-package
options.description: FHIR package to load on startup, specified by directive. Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --ci-package
options.description: FHIR package to load on startup, specified by directive. Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --load-examples
options.description: If package loading should include example instances

options.name: --reference-implementation
options.description: If running as the Reference Implementation, the package directive or literal.

options.name: --fhir-source
options.description: FHIR Contents to load, either in this directory or by subdirectories named per tenant.

options.name: --protect-loaded-content
options.description: If set, loaded content will be protected from modification.

options.name: --r4
options.description: FHIR R4 Tenants to create. Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --r4b
options.description: FHIR R4B Tenants to create. Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --r5
options.description: FHIR R5 Tenants to create. Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --smart-required
options.description: Tenants that require SMART on FHIR support, * for all.

options.name: --smart-optional
options.description: Tenants that support SMART on FHIR but do not require it, * for all.

options.name: --enable-mcp
options.description: True to enable Model Context Protocol (MCP) at [root]/mcp.

options.name: --create-existing-id
options.description: Allow Create interactions (POST) to specify an ID.

options.name: --create-as-update
options.description: Allow Update interactions (PUT) to create new resources.

options.name: --max-subscription-minutes
options.description: Maximum number of minutes a subscription can be active.

options.name: --zulip-email
options.description: Zulip bot email address to use for Zulip notifications.

options.name: --zulip-key
options.description: Zulip bot API key to use for Zulip notifications.

options.name: --zulip-url
options.description: Zulip server URL to use for Zulip notifications.

options.name: --smtp-host
options.description: SMTP host to use for email notifications.

options.name: --smtp-port
options.description: SMTP port to use for email notifications.

options.name: --smtp-user
options.description: SMTP user to use for email notifications.

options.name: --smtp-password
options.description: SMTP password to use for email notifications.

options.name: --fhirpath-lab-url
options.description: FHIRPath Lab URL to use for external FHIRPath tests.

options.name: --otel-otlp-endpoint
options.description: Enables OpenTelemetry and sends traces, metrics, and logs via OLTP to the specified endpoint

options.name: --otel-otlp-protocol
options.description: Specifies the OTLP transport protocol to be used for all telemetry data. Valid values are 'grpc' and 'http/protobuf'.

options.name: --otel-otlp-traces-endpoint
options.description: Enables OpenTelemetry and sends traces via OLTP to the specified endpoint

options.name: --otel-otlp-metrics-endpoint
options.description: Enables OpenTelemetry and sends metrics via OLTP to the specified endpoint

options.name: --otel-otlp-logs-endpoint
options.description: Enables OpenTelemetry and sends logs via OLTP to the specified endpoint

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
